title: HyCraft
description: HyCraft is a fantasy and adventure modpack inspired by Hytale!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HyCraft/BH_HyCraft_header.webp) HyCraft is a fantasy adventure modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 focused on exploration, improved combat, magic, and a colorful stylized world, offering a complete and immersive gameplay experience for both singleplayer and multiplayer. ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HyCraft/BH_HyCraft_description.webp) HyCraft is a fantasy-focused modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 built around exploration, adventure, and a living world. The game features a wide range of biomes, handcrafted structures, dungeons, and new creatures that make every journey feel different. The visual style is colorful and stylized, aiming for a fantasy look rather than realism, with worlds that feel designed and full of detail. Gameplay in HyCraft emphasizes exploration, combat, and progression. You will encounter tougher enemies, powerful bosses, new weapons, magic systems, and improved combat mechanics that make fighting more engaging. Villages, NPCs, and world content help the world feel active and immersive, whether you are playing solo or with friends. HyCraft is designed to feel like a complete adventure experience from start to finish. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HyCraft/BH_HyCraft_screenshots.webp)
